name: ExtensionSubstanceReferenceInformation_GeneElement
title: R5: Todo (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceReferenceInformation.geneElement` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceReferenceInformation.geneElement` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `SubstanceReferenceInformation.geneElement` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceReferenceInformation.geneElement` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubstanceReferenceInformation` is not mapped.
Element `SubstanceReferenceInformation.geneElement` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
